\tzpentry{ID4425}{Quantum Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4425 introduces Quantum Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} R^{\rho}{}_{\sigma\mu\nu} = \partial_{\mu}\Gamma^{\rho}{}_{\nu\sigma} - \partial_{\nu}\Gamma^{\rho}{}_{\mu\sigma} + \Gamma^{\rho}{}_{\mu\lambda}\Gamma^{\lambda}{}_{\nu\sigma} - \Gamma^{\rho}{}_{\nu\lambda}\Gamma^{\lambda}{}_{\mu\sigma} + \frac{\hbar}{2} \langle \Psi_1|[\partial_{\mu},\partial_{\nu}]|\Psi_2\rangle \,\varepsilon^{\rho}{}_{\sigma\mu\nu}. \end{equation}
